title: data-manifest result
description: Result of a ``data-manifest`` mint — counts + the manifest-doc identity.

manifest_path.description: Path the manifest was written to.
manifest_path.title: Manifest Path

roots.description: The roots the manifest was minted over.
roots.title: Roots

manifest_doc_sha.description: Canonical-JSON sha256 of the file records — the manifest's identity AS A DOCUMENT (the journaled mint's 'new known-good' fingerprint). Distinct from the raw-byte file-content shas inside it.
manifest_doc_sha.title: Manifest Doc Sha
